title: The Repair Verdict
description: The Straw Hats enter the water city, where canals, shipwrights, and the promise of repairs turn the damaged Merry into the crew’s central worry.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Kaku, Nami, Usopp, Zoro, Sanji. The Straw Hats enter the water city, where canals, shipwrights, and the promise of repairs turn the damaged Merry into the crew’s central worry.

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: Yeah!! Hahah! Thanks for repairing our ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Karifa, what's going on over there?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: is refusing to pay for the repair.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Look where you move that thing, idiot!!

summary: The Straw Hats enter the water city, where canals, shipwrights, and the promise of repairs turn the damaged Merry into the crew’s central worry.
